effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit is boosted, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and increase the [Power] of this unit by the original [Shield] of the unit that is boosting this unit until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Even if you stumble, you must always stand up to move forward again.

effectEN:
Friend-[CONT](RC):If you have another unit in the same column as this unit, that unit and this unit become "Friends".
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your other "Friends".
flavorTextEN: Nihihi♪ I thought of something really good♡

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Draw a card, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: With thanks to the school.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have three or more other rear-guards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: (D-LBT01): With everyone gathered together, it looks really fun.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, reveal the top card of your deck, and if it is a non-grade 2 unit card, call it to an open (RC). If you could not call a card, put the revealed card on the bottom of your deck.
flavorTextEN: Pouring heart and soul into a flash of inspiration.

effectEN: Black Wings (Active when bind only has even grades)-[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], Soul Charge (1), choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and that unit cannot [Stand] during the next stand phase.
flavorTextEN: Fly together with me! To the end of the skies!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your rear-guard is returned to your hand, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Lessons for various fields of art are held in the academy.

effectEN: Black Wings (Active when bind only has even grades)-[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your opponent's back row rear-guards, and [Rest] it.
flavorTextEN: I just, hope that you stay cheerful…

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle for each of your cards in your order zone.
flavorTextEN: Overflowing, a torrent of emotions.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your Order Zone has a card, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Hey, let's go?

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you played "Truehearted Ruby" and "Everlasting Sapphire" this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: The shape of emotions expressed in words. That will assist you greatly.

effectEN: [CONT](Back Row RC):This unit unit gets "Boost" and [Power]-2000.
flavorTextEN: If she can do it, so can I!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if "Rondo of Eventide Moon, Feltyrosa" is on your (VC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a <Ghost> normal unit not named "Canon of Overlaid-spinning, Dietlinde" from your drop, and call it to an open (RC).
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, put this unit on the bottom of your deck. (Must be performed)
flavorTextEN: The night, it has only just begun.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) during your main phase, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your soul, and call it to an open (RC). Then, for each card in your soul, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
Powerful-[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a grade 3 or greater vanguard, if your soul has no cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Look, you should sing along too!

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you have a vanguard with "Wilista" in its card name, COST  [put a Gem card from your drop on the bottom of your deck], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Magical powers that melt hearts reside within the light of those pupils.

effectEN:
[CONT](GC):All of your units with "Earnescorrect" in their card names get [Shield]+10000.
[CONT](GC):All of your rear-guards with "Earnescorrect" in their card names cannot be hit.
flavorTextEN: Fun things together with everyone. Because that brings the most happiness.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), COST  [reveal a card with "Kairi" in its card name from your hand], and this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: If you take a short break, I believe it will be easier to show results.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you played an order this turn, this unit gets "Boost".
flavorTextEN: Everyone is watching. Please straighten your collar.

effectEN: Black Wings (Active when bind only has even grades)-[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), Soul Charge (2).
flavorTextEN: To stand before the audience. Don't you think its better to have a certain level of grace?

nameEN: Charmed in the Moonlit Night, Mechtild
effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit's attack hits, if you have another <Ghost>, choose one of your other units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Some day, together with dear sister only.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) during your battle phase, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: That kindness displayed, is truly devilish.

effectEN:
If you have six or more units, play this with COST  [Soul Blast (2)]!
Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: To my beloved, with special ♡ packed in!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have a vanguard with "Haseritt" in its card name, COST  [Put a grade 2 or less card from you hand into your soul], look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one grade 3 card with [Power] 12000 or less, grade 2 card with [Power] 9000 or less or grade 1 card with [Power] 7000 or less, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck. If you did not call, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Lock-on, shoot♪ Your heart is now mine♡

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Luticia" in its card name, look at the top three cards of your deck, choose one card from among them, put it into your soul, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your soul has two or more Cursed Play cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. If your soul has four or more Cursed Play cards, [Power]+15000 instead of +5000.
flavorTextEN: Wan wan? Hef eak hugeher.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your other rear-guard is returned to your hand, if this unit is on your (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and that unit and this unit get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Thank you for your hard work. I'll be here gazing upon the sun for a little longer.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of that battle for each of your other units.
flavorTextEN: The days we've been together are on the first page of my precious memories.

nameEN: Large Flower that Dyes the Night, Palmyra
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, you may put this card into your soul.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, if your damage zone has more cards than your opponent, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Friend-[CONT](RC):If you have another unit in the same column as this unit, that unit and this unit become "Friends".
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if you have three or more other "Friends", this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. If you have five or more, choose one of your rear-guards with the Friend ability not in the same column as this unit, and you may return it to your hand.
flavorTextEN: Showering with the fountain. That is a "forbidden play".

effectEN:
Friend-[CONT](RC):If you have another unit in the same column as this unit, that unit and this unit become "Friends".
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have another "Friend",  this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Hey now! Let's become friends and have fun~!

effectEN:
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
Powerful-[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if your soul has no cards, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn. If you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Herminia" in its card name, until end of that battle, this unit performs drive check.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 3 with "Kyouka" in its card name, choose up to one Magazine card from your drop, and put it into your hand. If you did not put it into your hand, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], search your deck for up to one Magazine card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Hot~ My makeup is gonna melt~

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you played a Magazine order this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :At the end of the battle your grade 3 or greater vanguard attacked, if you played a Magazine order this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and [Stand] this unit.
flavorTextEN: Flap your wings, and ride on the new wind towards the blue sky.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your other rear-guard is put on the bottom of your deck during your battle phase, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit's attack hit a vanguard, COST  [put this unit on the bottom of your deck], draw a card, and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Well, what are you gonna do now~♪

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 3 with "Harselitte" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose up to one grade 3 or less card from your hand, and call it to (RC). If you called, draw a card
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 3 with "Haseritt" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose up to one grade 3 or less card from your hand, and call it to (RC). If you called, draw a card
flavorTextEN: I've gotta look for a personality that wouldn't lose to others too.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by your grade 3 or greater vanguard's ability, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):When your other rear-guard is returned to your hand by your vanguard's ability, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Clean quick and play hard ♪

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 3 with "Lilfa" in its card name, choose one of your grade 2 or greater rear-guards, and you may return it to your hand.
flavorTextEN: I'm happy to be blessed with good friends~

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your other rear-guard if returned to your hand by your grade 3 or greater vanguard's ability, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put this unit into soul], draw a card, choose up to one grade 3 card from your hand, and call it to an open (RC).
flavorTextEN: Isn't this amazing?! Wanna try it on? Wanny try?

nameEN: On the Verge of Being Late! Pulfa
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Lilfa" in its card name, choose a grade 2 or less normal unit with "Lilfa" in its card name from your drop, and you may put it into your soul. If you put a card, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Hurry, hurry. The textbooks are heavy!

If you put a card into your soul, look at the top card of your deck. (Return it to its original spot after confirming it)

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Mediell" in its card name, look at the top card of your deck, and put it on the top of your deck or into your soul. flavorTextEN: Hehe, it pays to have worked hard taking care of them.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacked a grade 3 or greater unit, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from drop by the ability of your grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Mediell" in its card name, this unit gets "[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle your vanguard attacked, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and [Stand] this unit." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: These flowers hold my thoughts to be together with everyone forever.

flavorTextEN: I'll make even the flowers smile!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by your grade 3 or greater vanguard's ability, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I wonder if it'll clear up by the time of the evening party......

[CONT](GC):During the battle that your vanguard with "Mediell" in its card name is attacked, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Phew~ This is absolutely necessary on a day like this~

effectEN: Powerful-[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your soul has no cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Anywhere's fine, as long as I can sing to my heart's content.

effectEN: [CONT](VC):If your soul has a Cursed Play card, when you would ride a grade 3 card with "Luticia" in its card name from your ride deck, you can ride with "Soul Blast (1) card with "Luticia" in its card name" instead of "Choose a card from your hand, and discard it".
flavorTextEN: An interview for a diva of the new era......? Who, me......!?

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your soul has two or more Cursed Play cards, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.

If you called a card, you cannot call cards from the drop until end of turn. (Putting a card from soul into drop is mandatory)
flavorTextEN: Enjoy the powerful moment, together with friends.

effectEN:

(White Wings is active when your bind only has odd grades, and Black Wings when it only has even grades)

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose up to two of your rear-guards, and return them to your hand.
[AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, if you persona rode this turn, choose up to two cards from your hand, and call them to (RC) in different rows.
flavorTextEN: Six talents who gather and shine. This encounter is not a coincidence.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC) by riding from "Accurate Interval, Clarissa", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], search your deck for up to one "Aim to be the Strongest Idol!", reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit's attack hits, draw a card, choose one of your rear-guards with "Earnescorrect" in its card name, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Strong, noble, and beautiful! That's our motto―!

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a face up Song from your order zone, and sing it. (Activate the Song's ability of the Song, and turn it face down after that ability resolves)
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, if you have two or more face down cards in your order zone,  choose a face up Song from your order zone, sing it, and until end of that battle, your opponent cannot call sentinels from hand to (GC).
flavorTextEN: With all my heart! Loro will sing with all her might!

effectEN:
[ACT](VC):COST  [Soul Blast (1) "Truehearted Ruby"], until end of turn, this unit gets [Power]+15000, and your opponent cannot intercept.
[ACT](VC):COST  [Soul Blast (1) "Everlasting Sapphire"], look at five cards from the top of your deck, choose up to two unit cards from among them, call them to open (RC), discard the rest, and those units get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'll definitely become a top idol!

effectEN: [AUTO](VC):When your drive check reveals a <Ghost> normal unit, you may call that unit to an open front row (RC). Then, if you called, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], this unit gets drive +1 until end of that battle. (During this battle, increase the drive of this unit by one. Even if this is the last drive check of the battle, you will still perform an additional drive check)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Special Live Tour Around the World!
effectEN:
(After a set order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[ACT](Order Zone)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (2)], choose one of your vanguards, and until end of turn, it gets "[CONT](VC):All of your rear-guards get [Power]+5000.".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (1) & Retire this unit], draw a card, choose up to one trigger unit from your bind zone, and it gets grade +1 until end of turn.
White Wings (Active when bind only has odd grades)-[CONT](RC/GC):This unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: The future can be changed. I always believe so.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[AUTO]:When this card is put into the Order Zone, choose a face down card from your Order Zone, and you may turn it face up.
[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Song is sung, choose the same number of your rear-guards as the number of face down cards in your Order Zone, and [Stand] them. Choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn for each unit that was [Stand] by this effect.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked while boosted, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This looks better... No, maybe this angle... is better..?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you played an order this turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+2000 for each of your cards in your order zone.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.
